_comment: Vendored Polymarket contract addresses. Asserts engine/exchanges/polymarket/src/{swap,approvals}.rs match. NEVER bypass the contracts_test that reads this file. A wrong address can move user funds to a contract under someone else's control. When Polymarket redeploys (e.g. CLOB V2 cutover 2026-04-28), update this file in lockstep with the source-code constants and verify each new address on https://polygonscan.com/.

NATIVE_USDC_ADDRESS.purpose: Native USDC on Polygon (Circle's CCTP-bridged version) — the form users typically receive from on-ramps.

BRIDGED_USDC_E_ADDRESS.purpose: USDC.e (PoS-bridged USDC) — Polymarket's collateral token pre-CLOB-V2.

USDC_ADDRESS.purpose: USDC.e (same address as BRIDGED_USDC_E_ADDRESS) — used as the collateral approval target.

CTF_ADDRESS.purpose: Conditional Tokens Framework (Gnosis CTF, ERC-1155) — the share-token contract.

CTF_EXCHANGE.purpose: Polymarket CLOB Exchange contract for binary markets (pre-CLOB-V2).

NEG_RISK_CTF_EXCHANGE.purpose: Polymarket Neg-Risk CLOB Exchange for multi-outcome markets (pre-CLOB-V2).

NEG_RISK_ADAPTER.purpose: Neg-Risk Adapter — manages multi-outcome share splits/merges/redemptions.
